title: drosera stolonifera subsp. porrecta
intro: Drosera stolonifera subsp. porrecta, also known as the erect Sundew, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the Droseraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Drosera stolonifera subsp. porrecta include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and potential anti-anxiety effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often in combination with other plants, to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
